title: Node.js Developer (Remote)
description: Role : Node.js Developer (Remote) Location : Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type: Contract Payout : $30 - $90/hour Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Node.Js Developer to work on a contract basis. The role involves building and maintaining scalable server-side applications using Node.js, ensuring high performance and reliability. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver efficient backend solutions. Key Responsibilities: • Develop and optimize backend services using Node.js to support application functionality. • Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code following best practices. • Troubleshoot and debug issues to ensure system stability and performance. • Integrate with databases and third-party APIs to enhance application capabilities. • Participate in code reviews and contribute to architectural decisions. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Proficiency in Node.js and JavaScript with a minimum of 2 years of relevant experience. • Experience with RESTful API development and integration. • Familiarity with database systems such as MongoDB or PostgreSQL. • Knowledge of version control systems, including Git. • Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Software Development industry, contributing to the enhancement of scalable and high-performance backend systems. The contract duration is flexible, with potential for long-term engagement based on project needs. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: Senior Front-End Engineer (React / TypeScript)
description: Joygame, 2009 yılında kurulan ve Türkiye'nin ilk oyun şirketi unvanını taşıyan bir oyun teknolojileri şirketidir. Bünyesindeki yetenekli oyun stüdyolarını hem finansal destek hem de sektörel deneyimiyle büyütürken, uluslararası pazarlarda başarı elde eden birçok oyunun geliştirilmesine ve yayınlanmasına katkı sağlamaktadır. PC, mobil ve NFT oyun kategorilerinde milyonlarca oyuncuya ulaşan Joygame, yerel içerikleri küresel ölçekte oyuncularla buluşturarak dünyanın dört bir yanında eğlence deneyimleri sunmayı hedeflemektedir. Koşuyolu, İstanbul'daki Mafia Studio ekibimize katılacak "Sr. Frontend Developer" arıyoruz. Aradığımız nitelikler aşağıda yer almaktadır. Rol Hakkında PixiJS ile render edilen, gerçek zamanlı bir uygulamanın üzerinde interaktif bir katman olarak çalışan bir React/TypeScript UI bileşen kütüphanesi geliştiriyoruz. Arayüz, canlı durumu backend'den WebSocket üzerinden alır, event tabanlı bir katmandan geçirerek Redux'a aktarır ve masaüstü, tablet ile mobilde responsive, çok dilli arayüzler sunar. Bu katmanı uçtan uca sahiplenecek kıdemli bir mühendis arıyoruz. Yalnızca özellik geliştirmeyecek; mimariyi, kalite çıtasını ve mühendislik pratiklerini sen belirleyeceksin. Bugün hızlı büyümüş, sağlam bir temeli olan bir kod tabanını alıp; test altyapısı, tutarlı responsive davranış ve ölçeklenebilir bir lokalizasyon sistemiyle olgun bir ürüne dönüştüreceksin. Sorumluluklar • Mimari: Bileşen kütüphanesinin yapısı ve event tabanlı state akışı (WebSocket → event bus → Redux). Modülerlik, tip güvenliği ve öngörülebilir state yönetimini sen tanımlarsın. • Bileşen kütüphanesi: Yeniden kullanılabilir, tip-güvenli bileşenler — kontroller, overlay'ler, modal'lar, dinamik değer göstergeleri, ayar panelleri ve bildirim bileşenleri. • Responsive tasarım: Masaüstü, tablet ve mobilde her iki yönde (portre/yatay), geniş bir çözünürlük ve piksel yoğunluğu yelpazesinde tutarlı davranış — tek, güvenilir bir ölçekleme yaklaşımıyla. • Lokalizasyon: Çok dilli / çok bölgeli altyapıyı sahiplenmek, eksiksizliğini güvence altına almak ve yeni diller ekleneceği zaman kolayca ölçeklenmesini sağlamak. • Kalite ve dayanıklılık: Otomatik test kültürü (birim + uçtan uca), CI/CD hattının sağlamlaştırılması, hata yönetimi ve erişilebilirlik standartları. • Performans: Verimli render, gereksiz re-render'ların azaltılması ve düşük donanımlı cihazlarda akıcı deneyim. • Teknik liderlik: Code-review kültürü, standartların belirlenmesi ve ekip büyüdükçe mentorluk. Teknoloji • React 19 + TypeScript (strict mode) • Redux Toolkit (+ redux-persist) • Tailwind CSS • Event tabanlı mimari — render motoru, WebSocket (Socket.IO) backend'i ve UI'ı birbirine bağlayan özel bir event bus • Lokalizasyon için i18n-js • Webpack build · GitLab CI/CD • Jest / React Testing Library / Playwright Aradığımız nitelikler • Prodüksiyonda derin React + TypeScript deneyimi ve büyük bir bileşen tabanını sürdürme geçmişi. • Sağlam Redux (tercihen Toolkit) deneyimi ve temiz state modelleme. • Responsive, çok-cihazlı CSS konusunda gerçek hâkimiyet (Tailwind artı) — bir layout'un yalnızca tasarım mockup'ında değil, her boyut ve yoğunlukta nasıl davrandığını düşünen biri. • Event tabanlı / gerçek zamanlı ön yüzlerde (WebSocket, mesaj-güdümlü state) deneyim. • Mevcut bir kod tabanına test kazandırma / mühendislik standartlarını yükseltme geçmişi. • Güçlü mühendislik alışkanlıkları: Git, CI/CD, code review ve sürdürülebilirliğe yönelik bir eğilim. Ek Nitelikler • PixiJS, canvas veya WebGL tabanlı UI deneyimi. • Web performansı optimizasyonu ve erişilebilirlik (WCAG) deneyimi. • Çok dilli / çok bölgeli ürünler geliştirme deneyimi. • Küçük bir ekipte teknik yön belirleme / mentorluk geçmişi.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Apilex is a global legaltech company building AI that transforms how legal professionals work. Powered by a proprietary database of 200M+ court decisions and legal documents, our platform delivers semantic search, contract analysis, and automated legal drafting — turning days of legal research into seconds. Since our founding, we've grown to a team of 90+ people and established ourselves as Türkiye's leading AI legal assistant. Now, we're taking it global — expanding into France, Germany, Brasil, Italy and Spain to compete in the billion-dollar legaltech market. What sets us apart? We don't use off-the-shelf AI. We build domain-specific, closed-circuit AI models with multi-layered verification systems that eliminate hallucinations and deliver answers backed by real citations and legal reasoning. Every feature we ship changes how lawyers work, not in theory, but in practice. We are hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to design and scale the high-traffic microservices that form the backbone of our global legal AI platform. Key Responsibilities Scalable Architecture: Design and develop high-traffic, scalable microservice architectures to support our expanding global footprint. Code Excellence: Raise the bar on code quality by leading code review processes and implementing best practices across the backend. Technical Leadership: Provide mentorship to the engineering team and guide technical decision-making for complex features. System Integration: Build and maintain reliable integrations between core services, AI agents, and large-scale data stores. Performance Optimization: Ensure system reliability and low latency across distributed services through efficient caching and messaging strategies. What We’re Looking For 5+ years of backend experience building and scaling Java and Spring Boot applications in production Strong foundation in software architecture design including OOP and SOLID principles across various scales Hands-on experience with both PostgreSQL and MongoDB including the ability to design hybrid data architectures Deep knowledge of Elasticsearch or similar technologies for high-performance search and indexing Practical experience with messaging systems like RabbitMQ or Kafka and in-memory caching with Redis Solid understanding of WebSocket and real-time streaming architectures for distributed environments Direct experience with cloud platforms and building automated CI/CD pipelines Ability to ship high-quality code and iterate quickly rather than waiting for perfect conditions Why join us? We're building the AI that lawyers rely on every day, across every area of their practice — the core of how thousands of legal professionals research, draft, and reason. You'll join a team solving one of the hardest challenges in AI: making it reliable enough for high-stakes, real-world decisions. We're scaling across Europe and Latin America, shipping fast, and setting the bar for what reliable AI looks like in legal. Whatever your role, your work here will be visible and meaningful. We're one of the fastest-growing AI companies in Türkiye, and we're looking for ambitious people who want to build the future of legal technology on a global stage. This is Apilex. AI for Legal. Join us.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Full Stack Developer Şirket: VBT Yazılım A.Ş. Lokasyon: Ankara (Hibrit) Çalışma Modeli: Hibrit VBT Yazılım A.Ş. ailesi olarak, genişleyen projelerimizde ve dinamik çalışma ortamımızda fark yaratacak, teknolojiyi tutkuyla takip eden bir "Full Stack Developer" arıyoruz! Genel Nitelikler ve Teknik Beklentiler Başarılı bir adaydan aşağıdaki konularda tecrübe ve yetkinlik sahibi olmasını bekliyoruz: Backend & Frameworks: Java: Java 8+, Spring Boot, Spring Batch ve Spring Security konularında deneyimli. PHP: PHP 5 ve CodeIgniter framework ile backend geliştirme tecrübesi olan. NodeJS: Sunucu taraflı geliştirme süreçlerine hakim. .Net: .Net ile API uygulamaları geliştirmiş. Frontend: JavaScript & ReactJS: Modern web arayüzleri geliştirme konusunda yetkin. JavaFX: Masaüstü uygulama geliştirme süreçlerine aşina. Veri Yönetimi & Mimari: ORM & Build Tools: Hibernate ORM, JPA ve Maven kullanımında uzman. Veritabanı: MySQL (RDMS) tasarımı ve Elasticsearch (NoSQL) veritabanlarında deneyimli. Mimari: Microservis mimarisi, RESTful ve SOAP web servisleri konularında tecrübeli. Caching: Hazelcast veya Redis gibi teknolojilere hakim. Altyapı & Diğer: Kuyruk Mekanizmaları: ActiveMQ veya RabbitMQ süreçlerini yönetebilen. Versiyon Kontrol: Git ve benzeri sistemleri etkin kullanabilen. Sistem & Güvenlik: Temel Linux komutlarını bilen, SSL/TLS, OAuth2, JWT ve E-İmza/Mobil İmza uygulamaları hakkında bilgi sahibi. Loglama & Paket Yönetimi: Log4J, NPM ve JSON formatlarına hakim. IDE: IntelliJ IDEA, NetBeans veya Eclipse ortamlarından en az birinde uzman. İş Tanımı VBT Yazılım'ın kurumsal projelerinde uçtan uca yazılım geliştirme süreçlerinde yer almak. Mevcut PHP ve Java tabanlı sistemlerin bakımını yapmak ve yeni özellikler eklemek. Mikroservis mimarisiyle ölçeklenebilir ve güvenli API'lar tasarlamak. Dosya yönetimi (yükleme, depolama, güvenlik) ve veritabanı optimizasyonu süreçlerini yürütmek. Neden VBT Yazılım? Ankara lokasyonunda, esnekliği destekleyen Hibrit çalışma modeli. Sürekli öğrenmeyi ve gelişimi destekleyen profesyonel bir ekip. Büyük ölçekli ve teknoloji odaklı projelerde sorumluluk alma fırsatı. Aradığımız yetkinliklere sahipsen ve VBT ekibinin bir parçası olmak istiyorsan, başvurunu bekliyoruz!

title: Senior Full Stack Developer
description: About Voltran Voltran builds AI agents for K–12 schools and institutions. Our flagship product is AI Live Lectures : video- and animation-based live teaching experiences powered by digital twins and the coordinated work of 15+ AI agents —built to deliver detailed, interactive learning at scale. The Role We’re hiring a Full Stack Engineer to help us build and ship end-to-end product experiences across web, mobile, backend, and AI services . You’ll collaborate closely with mobile and backend teams to integrate intelligent workflows into our platform, and you’ll contribute directly to core product features—from UI to APIs to production infrastructure. What You’ll Do Full-stack product development: Build user-facing experiences and backend systems that support AI-powered learning flows. Backend & APIs: Design and maintain REST/GraphQL services and microservices (Python/FastAPI, Node/TypeScript, or similar). AI integration: Integrate LLM/SLM-powered features (tutoring, content generation, Q&A) into web and Flutter applications. Service orchestration: Build robust service layers that expose AI functionality with strong observability, rate-limiting, and reliability. Data & retrieval: Implement and optimize RAG pipelines (agentic RAG, Graph RAG), vector search, and evaluation workflows. Infrastructure & DevOps: Own CI/CD, containerization, monitoring, and scalable deployments (Docker/Kubernetes on AWS/GCP/Azure). Cross-functional collaboration: Work with product and design to define requirements, deliver polished features, and iterate quickly. Must-Have Qualifications Full-stack experience: 2+ years shipping production features across frontend + backend. Backend strength: Strong experience building REST/GraphQL APIs , microservices, and secure service architectures. Frontend proficiency: Experience with React / Next.js / Svelte (or similar) and building clean, responsive UIs. AI-enabled systems: Hands-on experience integrating LLM/SLM capabilities into real products (agents, RAG, tool calling, evals). Retrieval & agents: Familiar with Agentic RAG , Graph RAG , MCP frameworks , and A2A protocol concepts . DevOps & Cloud: CI/CD + Docker + Kubernetes + cloud deployments (AWS/GCP/Azure or BaaS platforms). Engineering fundamentals: Data structures, algorithms, Git, testing, debugging, and secure coding practices. Proof of shipping: At least one publicly available product/app you’ve built or significantly contributed to. Nice to Have Flutter experience (mobile integrations). Strong Python experience (FastAPI/Flask) and/or TypeScript/Node ecosystem depth. Familiarity with fine-tuning and RL concepts (policies, trajectories, reward/return). Ability to learn fast, work iteratively, and thrive in a high-ownership startup environment. What We Offer Competitive salary + option pool in a fast-growing edtech startup AI IDE subscription to accelerate your workflow Learning stipend + team offsites High ownership, real product impact, and fast shipping culture Onboarding & Training We support new team members with structured learning across prompt engineering, agents, fine-tuning, reinforcement learning, advanced AI IDE usage , and practical production workflows—so you can ramp quickly and ship confidently.

title: Backend Engineer (Golang)
description: We are seeking a Backend Engineer (Go/Python) to maintain, extend, and harden an existing real-time data processing engine while building the testing and validation infrastructure around it. This role is centered on improving an already-operational Go-based backend, adding new capabilities, increasing robustness and observability, and developing a comprehensive automated testing harness spanning unit, integration, SIL, and HIL environments. Candidates must have at least 3+ years of relevant professional experience ; junior or purely academic backgrounds are not a fit. You will work within a multi-disciplinary engineering team, collaborating with algorithm, FPGA, embedded, and systems engineers to evolve the data engine into a reliable, scalable, and well-validated core platform. The role requires deep expertise in Go, strong fluency in Python, and disciplined engineering around concurrency, performance, databases, networking, and CI/CD . Responsibilities Real-Time Data Engine Development & Maintenance • Maintain, update, and improve an existing real-time data processing engine written in Go (Golang). • Design and implement new capabilities and services within the engine as product needs evolve. • Refactor and optimize existing code for performance, reliability, maintainability, and testability. • Build scalable ingestion, processing, and distribution pipelines for streaming and real-time data sources. • Implement efficient concurrency models using goroutines, channels, and synchronization primitives. • Optimize throughput, latency, and resource usage under real-time operational constraints. • Develop and maintain websocket-based streaming interfacesand related backend APIs. Testing Harness & Validation Framework • Design and implement a comprehensive testing harness for the data engine and all other sources feeding data into the engine. • Develop and maintain automated testing at all levels, including: Unit testing, Integration testing, Software-in-the-loop (SIL), Hardware-in-the-loop (HIL) • Ensure testing workflows are integrated into CI/CD pipelines, including automated execution up to and including HIL where applicable. • Build validation tools and replay/simulation frameworks for verifying real-time behavior, correctness, and robustness. • Use pytest and Python-based tooling to orchestrate, validate, and analyze tests. Python Tooling & Analysis • Develop supporting tools and analysis workflows using Python, NumPy, and notebook environments. • Build data inspection, debugging, and verification utilities for both live and recorded datasets. • Integrate Python-based analysis and validation environments with Go-based services and pipelines. Networking, Services & Infrastructure • Build and debug backend systems using: HTTP/HTTPS ,WebSockets (WS/WSS), TCP/IP, Linux sockets and services • Configure and troubleshoot Docker networking, bridges, and port forwarding. • Deploy and operate NGINX for reverse proxying, routing, and service exposure. • Design and maintain production-grade backend services with strong understanding of Linux networking behavior. Databases & Data Management • Design, maintain, and optimize data systems using: ClickHouse, PostgreSQL • Implement and manage schema evolution, database migrations, indexing, partitioning, and performance optimization. • Manage database snapshots, backups, and restore workflows. • Integrate telemetry and metrics systems, including practical use of Prometheus with telemetry-oriented databases and services. DevOps, CI/CD & Engineering Workflow • Build and maintain Docker-based development and deployment environments. • Use Git, GitLab, and CI/CD pipelines for automated builds, tests, validation, and deployments. • Maintain high software quality through code review, branch hygiene, reproducible builds, and automated regression coverage. • Use modern AI-assisted development workflowsproductively, including practical use of agentic coding systems where appropriate. Collaboration & Documentation • Work closely with DSP, FPGA, embedded, and systems engineers to integrate the backend into the broader product. • Produce and maintain clear technical documentation for architecture, APIs, test frameworks, deployment, and operational workflows. • Participate in technical reviews and contribute to long-term maintainability and product evolution. Minimum Qualifications • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or a related field. • 3+ years of professional software engineering experience in backend, systems, or infrastructure-oriented development. • Deep expertise in Go (Golang), including: Concurrency and goroutines, Synchronization and thread-safe design, Backend service development, Performance-oriented programming • Strong fluency in Python, including NumPy, notebook environments, and pytest. • Experience maintaining and evolving existing backend systems, not only greenfield development. • Experience designing and implementing automated testing frameworks across multiple levels, including unit and integration testing. • Strong understanding of Docker and containerized development/deployment workflows. • Strong networking knowledge (HTTP/S, WebSockets, TCP/IP, sockets) and practical experience with Docker networking, including bridges and port forwarding. • Practical experience with NGINX in reverse proxy or service exposure roles. • Strong experience with ClickHouse and PostgreSQL, including migrations, indexing, partitioning, and optimization. • Advanced experience with Git, GitLab, and CI/CD pipelines. • Strong Linux proficiency, including services, networking, process debugging, and performance investigation. Preferred Qualifications • Experience with real-time data processing engines or streaming backend architectures. • Experience building testing harnesses for complex systems, including SIL and HIL automation. • Experience with Go websocket libraries such as Gorilla or Centrifugo. • Experience integrating Prometheus into telemetry, metrics, or backend observability workflows. • Experience with Django or adjacent Python backend frameworks. • Familiarity with GIS concepts, coordinate reference systems, and tools such as pyproj and GDAL. • Strong foundation in linear algebra and prior work involving numerical or geometry-heavy backend systems. • Experience in software-defined defense or other real-time sensing/decision systems. • Proficiency with AI-assisted development tools and practical use of agentic coding systems in day-to-day software engineering workflows. • Previous experience with C++ is a significant advantage, particularly for performance-critical or systems-level development. Benefits: • Competitive salary and a comprehensive benefits package, including health insurance and fuel support. • Continued support for candidates currently enrolled in a master's or doctoral program. • Opportunities for continuous professional growth and skill development. • Engage in a collaborative and innovative work environment. • Enjoy a positive and enriching work environment, situated in a desirable location.

title: Backend Engineer (JSON Schema) | $42/hr Remote
description: Position: Backend Engineer (JSON Schema Developer) Type: Hourly contract Compensation: $40 - $42/hour Location: Remote Commitment: 10 40 hours/week Role Responsibilities Analyze complex documents to identify and model structured data points. Design and implement robust JSON schemas with appropriate field types and structure. Define validation rules, constraints, and logical relationships within schemas. Develop API contracts to ensure seamless data integration across systems. Collaborate with stakeholders to refine data requirements and schema design. Document schema structures, field definitions, and usage guidelines clearly. Promote best practices in data modeling, architecture, and scalability. Requirements Strong experience in data modeling, schema design, and JSON schema development. Expertise in creating deeply nested and scalable data structures. Strong understanding of validation logic, field typing, and schema constraints. Ability to translate unstructured data into structured models. Experience defining API contracts and data integration workflows. Excellent written and verbal communication skills. Ability to work independently in a remote, distributed environment. Application Process (Takes 20 Min) Easy Apply on LinkedIn Check email for next steps Participate in resume evaluation & interview stage

title: Kıdemli Yazılım Geliştirme Uzmanı (PHP)
description: Türkiye'nin en büyük ve en yenilikçi gruplarından olan, her geçen gün farklı sektörlerde aldığı yatırım kararları ile öne çıkan Turkuvaz Medya Grubu çatısı altında, sektöründe hızla büyüyen pazaryeri şirketimiz idefix.com’da görevlendirilmek üzere KIDEMLİ PHP YAZILIM GELİŞTİRME UZMANI arayışımız bulunmaktadır. GENEL NİTELİKLER PHP ile backend geliştirme konusunda en az 5 yıl profesyonel deneyim sahibi, Symfony, Laravel veya benzeri modern PHP frameworklerinden en az birinde deneyimli, RESTful API geliştirme konusunda deneyimli, Nesneye yönelik programlama (OOP) prensiplerine hakim, PostgreSQL, MySQL veya benzeri ilişkisel veritabanları ile uygulama geliştirmiş, Veritabanı ile verimli çalışan ve performans odaklı sorgular yazabilen, Cache ve asenkron işleme mekanizmaları ile çalışma deneyimi olan (Redis, Kafka, RabbitMQ vb.), Git versiyon kontrol sistemi ile aktif geliştirme deneyimine sahip, Production ortamında çalışan backend servisleri geliştirmiş ve bu sistemlerin sürdürülebilirliğine katkı sağlamış, Kod kalitesi, okunabilirlik ve sürdürülebilirlik konularına önem veren, Analitik düşünebilen ve problem çözme yeteneği güçlü, Takım çalışmasına yatkın ve sorumluluk sahibi, Yüksek trafikli sistemlerde geliştirme deneyimi, E-ticaret veya pazaryeri projelerinde görev almış. İŞ TANIMI Backend servislerinin tasarlanması, geliştirilmesi ve sürdürülebilir şekilde iyileştirilmesinde aktif rol almak, Yeni özelliklerin teknik tasarım, geliştirme ve canlıya alma süreçlerine katkı sağlamak, Mevcut backend sistemlerinin performans, stabilite ve sürdürülebilirliğini artırmaya yönelik iyileştirmeler yapmak, Ölçeklenebilir, bakımı kolay ve sürdürülebilir backend çözümleri geliştirmek, Kod kalitesini korumak amacıyla code review süreçlerine katılmak ve ekip içi teknik standartlara katkı sağlamak, Üretim ortamında karşılaşılan teknik sorunların analiz edilmesi ve çözümüne katkı sağlamak, Mevcut kod tabanını anlayarak gerektiğinde refactor etmek ve teknik borcun azaltılmasına katkıda bulunmak, Backend sistemlerinin güvenilir ve öngörülebilir şekilde çalışmasını sağlamak için gerekli geliştirmeleri yapmak, Ürün, frontend ve diğer teknik ekip üyeleri ile birlikte çalışarak teknik çözümler geliştirmek, Yazılan kodun performans, doğruluk ve sürdürülebilirlik açısından sorumluluğunu almak.

title: AI Engineer (Full Stack)
description: About Promake Promake is a multi-tenant SaaS company serving thousands of small businesses. What we're building is a team of AI agents that runs a small business's digital operations . The website builder came first: multi-turn, tool-using agent pipelines that build and modify customer sites. An ads agent now runs beside it, and the roadmap points further — toward bookkeeping, CRM, and beyond. Everything runs behind a multi-provider LLM gateway with full tracing on every model call. These are real, load-bearing AI products serving live customers — not demos, not wrappers. The pipelines run at meaningful scale, and their cost, latency, and output quality are watched weekly like any other production system. The role You'll own agent pipelines end-to-end — how context is constructed, how the loop is orchestrated, what gets measured, and what it all costs — and you'll work full-stack alongside the product team on the surfaces around them: you can carry a feature from model call to UI when the work calls for it. This is a senior individual-contributor role: when a pipeline underperforms, you're the person who finds out why from the traces, designs the fix, writes it up so the team can weigh in, and then builds it. And because the agent family is growing, the patterns you set today become the template every new agent inherits. We're a small team, so this role carries genuine ownership from day one. The judgment is yours to exercise. This is an İstanbul-based hybrid role. We work together in the office 4 days a week. What you'll do Own agent pipelines across the product family — the site builder today, the ads agent and the agents that follow as the family grows: prompt and context engineering, tool design, orchestration, retries and fallbacks — with cache-friendliness and token economics treated as first-class design constraints, not afterthoughts. Make quality measurable: build the evals and telemetry that tell us whether a pipeline change helped, before and after it ships. Hunt cost and latency: read production traces, find where the money and the wall-clock actually go, and quantify what a fix is worth as a share of the total before building it. Ship features across the stack alongside the product team: the services around the agents and, when the feature calls for it, the surfaces users touch (FastAPI + TypeScript/React today; we're pragmatic about tooling). Write design documents that let the team make a decision without a follow-up meeting — problem, evidence, options, recommendation. Work across a multi-provider setup (via an LLM gateway) where failover, model routing, and per- provider quirks are everyday realities. What we look for We care more about judgment than about which frameworks you've touched. The engineers who thrive here can: Read traces like a detective. Given raw production sessions and a loose brief, you find the things that matter unprompted. Quantify before building. "This is inefficient" isn't a finding; "this is 30% of session cost and here's the basis" is. Reason about failure modes. For any pipeline change: what degrades, what loops, what the user experiences, what the eval would miss. Move across the stack. You're not blocked at the API boundary — when a pipeline change needs a backend endpoint or a UI touch, you can do it yourself. Engineer for the long haul. Our agents are long-lived production systems, not POCs — you write AI code the next person can read, test, extend, and operate. Communicate so others can act. Your writeups end debates rather than starting them. Requirements 3–6 years building production software, including 1.5+ years shipping LLM-powered product features (not just prototypes). Strong Python (our agent services are FastAPI + LangGraph). Beyond that we're tooling-agnostic: what matters is that you can deliver a feature end-to-end with whatever stack fits. Our product surfaces are TypeScript/React today — that may evolve. Strong software-engineering fundamentals: you structure AI systems as scalable, maintainable production code — sensible abstractions, tests where they matter — not notebook-grade prototypes. Hands-on with multi-turn, tool-using agent pipelines — you've designed the loop, not just called an API. Working fluency in token economics: prompt caching, context budgeting, what makes a call expensive or slow, and how to verify a cost claim from telemetry. You've built evals for LLM output that changed a real decision. Can write clearly for a technical audience. Nice to have Experience with LLM gateways / routing layers (LiteLLM or similar) and multi-provider failover. Observability for LLM systems (Langfuse or similar; ClickHouse a plus). Image-generation pipelines and their content-policy/retry realities. Multi-tenant SaaS experience. Our hiring process We run a focused take-home (max ~4 hours) : review real (sanitized) traces from our production agent pipeline and deliver a tight written review plus one working artifact of your choice — a pipeline improvement with a mini-eval, or a minimal trace-inspector app. We share the rubric and its weights up front — there's no hidden scoring trick. We're evaluating judgment and prioritization, not coverage. AI coding assistants are explicitly allowed; you own every claim.

title: Fullstack Developer (React.js / Next.js)
description: Hakkımızda StartGate, teknoloji odaklı girişimlerin büyümesini destekleyen, girişimcileri yatırımcılar, mentorlar, kurumsal iş ortakları ve sektör profesyonelleriyle buluşturan bir girişimcilik merkezidir. İnovasyonu odağına alan çalışma kültürümüz, güçlü iş birliklerimiz ve kreatif endüstriler odağımızla, teknoloji ekosistemine değer katacak projeler üretmeye ve girişimlerin sürdürülebilir büyümesine katkı sağlamaya devam ediyoruz. Görev ve Sorumluluklar React ve Next.js teknolojileri ile modern web uygulamaları geliştirmek Responsive ve kullanıcı odaklı arayüzler geliştirmek Backend servisleri ile REST API entegrasyonları gerçekleştirmek Mevcut uygulamaların bakımını yapmak ve yeni özellikler geliştirmek Uygulama performansını ve kullanıcı deneyimini sürekli iyileştirmek Tasarım, ürün ve backend ekipleri ile yakın iş birliği içinde çalışmak Kod kalitesini artırmak için best practice’leri uygulamak Aranan Nitelikler HTML, CSS ve JavaScript konularında güçlü bilgi sahibi olmak React.js ve Next.js ile uygulama geliştirme deneyimine sahip olmak Vite geliştirme ortamı ile çalışma deneyimi Responsive web geliştirme konusunda bilgi ve deneyim sahibi olmak REST API entegrasyonları konusunda deneyim sahibi olmak Git ve versiyon kontrol sistemlerini etkin kullanabilmek AWS servisleri hakkında temel seviyede bilgi sahibi olmak Takım çalışmasına yatkın, öğrenmeye açık ve çözüm odaklı olmak Tercih Sebepleri TypeScript deneyimi Tailwind CSS veya Material UI kullanmış olmak Docker ve CI/CD süreçleri hakkında bilgi sahibi olmak SEO, Core Web Vitals ve frontend performans optimizasyonu konularında deneyim AI destekli uygulamalar veya SaaS ürünlerinde çalışma deneyimi Sana Ne Sunuyoruz? Teknoloji ve girişimcilik ekosisteminin merkezinde çalışma fırsatı. Dinamik, yenilikçi ve iş birliğine dayalı bir çalışma kültürü. Yetkinliklerini geliştirebileceğin öğrenme ve kariyer gelişimi fırsatları. Fikirlerini hayata geçirebileceğin, inisiyatif almayı destekleyen bir çalışma ortamı. Alanında uzman ekiplerle birlikte çalışma ve güçlü bir profesyonel ağ oluşturma imkânı. Performans ve gelişim odaklı kariyer fırsatları. Modern ofis ortamı ve sosyal etkinlikler Eğer modern web teknolojileriyle ölçeklenebilir ürünler geliştirmeyi seviyor ve hızla büyüyen bir teknoloji ekibinin parçası olmak istiyorsan, seni StartGate ekibinde görmek isteriz. 📩 CV'ni: hr@startgate.com adresine gönderebilirsin. StartGate Where dreams come true!
